debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ |(↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n| ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n

failed_attempts:
rw [abs_sub_le_iff]
    constructor <;> apply le_of_sub_nonneg <;>
      field_simp <;>
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)] <;>
      nlinarith [hj, hℓ, hn, hk, hab.le]

rw [abs_sub_le_iff]
    constructor <;> apply le_of_sub_nonneg <;> field_simp <;>
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)] <;>
        nlinarith [hj, hℓ, hn, hk, hab.le]
